name: home23
description: Installable AI operating system — persistent agents with living brains

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/agent/brain-operations-client.test.ts tests/agent/brain-route-resolver.test.ts tests/agent/chat-turn-images.test.ts tests/agent/context-brain-retrieval.test.ts tests/agent/context-worker-runs.test.ts tests/agent/good-life-identity.test.ts tests/agent/history-image-persistence.test.ts tests/agent/memory-compaction.test.ts tests/agent/neighbor-state.test.ts tests/agent/text-generation.test.ts tests/agent/tool-result.test.ts tests/agent/tool-result-provider-branches.test.ts tests/agent/tools/brain.test.ts tests/agent/tools/cron.test.ts tests/agent/tools/research.test.ts tests/agent/tools/shell.test.ts tests/agent/tools/workers.test.ts tests/agent/turn-activity-lease.test.ts tests/agent/turn-entrypoint-callers.test.ts tests/agent/turn-entrypoints.test.ts tests/agent/verification.test.ts tests/dashboard/chat-state.test.ts tests/scheduler/*.test.ts tests/workers/*.test.ts && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/cosmo23/research-run-operation-adapter.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-pinned-source-reader.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-requester-output-writer.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-compile-provider-adapter.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/research-operation-executors.test.cjs tests/cosmo23/agent-executor-memory-context.test.cjs && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/dashboard/yaml-write-safety.test.js tests/dashboard/operator-ui.test.js && node --test --test-concurrency=1 'tests/cli/**/*.test.js' && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/engine/dashboard/brain-operation-routes.test.js tests/engine/agents/agent-executor-memory-context.test.js 'tests/engine/**/*.test.js'
scripts.pm2:restart: node cli/home23.js stop && node cli/home23.js start
